line: - `src/cmd/common.rs:900` saves checkpoints under `.saw/checkpoints/YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS`, deduplicates recent files, writes `saw-state.json`, `session-snapshot.jsonl`, `manifest.json`, and prints the checkpoint path.

line: - `crates/saw-daemon/src/alerter.rs:145` now checkpoints before any stuck action when `checkpoint_before_action` is enabled, while preserving `checkpoint-kill`.

line: - The repo already had most checkpoint plumbing; the missing piece was a separate “checkpoint before action” path rather than only `checkpoint-kill`.

items: The repo already had most checkpoint plumbing; the missing piece was a separate “checkpoint before action” path rather than only `checkpoint-kill`.

line: - Deduplicating `recently_modified_files` in the manifest avoids repeated copies from rewrite-heavy sessions.

items: Deduplicating `recently_modified_files` in the manifest avoids repeated copies from rewrite-heavy sessions.

line: - Implemented `--checkpoint` as an additive flag that works with any stuck action, instead of introducing a new `--on-stuck` enum variant.

items: Implemented `--checkpoint` as an additive flag that works with any stuck action, instead of introducing a new `--on-stuck` enum variant.

line: - Kept `checkpoint-kill` behavior intact for explicit “save then interrupt” semantics.

items: Kept `checkpoint-kill` behavior intact for explicit “save then interrupt” semantics.

line: - Printed checkpoint path from `save_checkpoint` directly so both manual and automatic checkpoint flows satisfy the user-visible path requirement.

items: Printed checkpoint path from `save_checkpoint` directly so both manual and automatic checkpoint flows satisfy the user-visible path requirement.
